resultNote: Refusal proof has not been accepted by provider access owner.
mustProve: Provider path refuses real participant, organisation, and Toastmasters records.
mustRemainBlocked: Send real records to a provider.
nextAction: Keep provider path blocked and collect private refusal/RFQ evidence.
publicSafeLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

resultNote: RFQ safe-alternative boundary needs sample-only evidence.
mustProve: RFQ or quote path uses fake/sample requirements only.

resultNote: Provider evidence redaction needs export reference.

publicSafeLine: Private provider evidence is not published.

resultNote: Access audit is clean but needs owner lock.
mustProve: No provider account, API key, production credential, or live environment access exists.

publicSafeLine: Live Decidim and provider access remain blocked.

mustProve: Public line says no provider has real-record access.

nextAction: Hold until owner signs provider boundary result.

resultNote: Provider incident route needs support owner note.
mustProve: Incident route exists if provider boundary fails.

mustProve: Provider owner accepts the repeat test result privately.
mustRemainBlocked: Let advisory review replace provider-owner signoff.

resultNote: Authority decision lock keeps provider approval blocked.
